name: OmopRace
title: OMOP Race (one Athena concept per Patient)
description: A Patient.extension that carries OMOP's race for this person directly as an Athena Standard concept reference. Unlike US Core race (which permits multiple `ombCategory` slices to support mixed-race source data), OMOP `person.race_concept_id` is a single integer column — by spec 'Mixed races are not supported'. This extension therefore is a flat `valueCoding` with code = Athena Race concept_id and system = the OMOP concept URI. Use this when the source feed already speaks OMOP; use `us-core-race` (and let the ETL map via `cm.race_omb_to_omop`) when the source speaks OMB.

element.short: OMOP race for this Patient — one concept

binding.description: One of the seven Athena Race-vocabulary concepts.
